narrative:
Dallas Twp (precinct in Crawford County) has 349 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 40.4 percentage points.
